title: Ucozy Ayurvedic Caramelized Duck Confit Leg
description: This is a salty, tender, lazy-sunday Croatian dish featuring duck-confit-leg, caramelized, and prepared in an ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly manner.
instructions: Rub duck leg with brown sugar, apple cider vinegar, cayenne pepper, and water.
Let it sit for at least an hour, then re-season with more salt and additional spices if desired.
Dredge in sesame oil and place on a rack over some ice cubes to keep the legs moist during cooking.
Roast in preheated oven for 4 hours.
Mix ginger paste with fennel seeds and brush onto duck skin.
Finish roasting for an additional hour or until it reaches an internal temperature of at least 165°F (74°C).
